questions.question: According to Paul, when did God choose believers in Christ?
options: Before the foundation of the world
questions.answer: Before the foundation of the world

questions.question: Paul prays that God would give the Ephesians a spirit of what?
Paul says believers were sealed with the Holy Spirit as a guarantee of their inheritance.
In him we have redemption through his blood, the _____ of our trespasses, according to the riches of his grace.
God placed all things under Christ's feet and appointed him to be _____ over everything for the church.
